chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.S-442 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For order on office objections 2. For hearing of CMA 3875/2024, 3. For hearing of main case. 10.09.2024. Mr. Sathi M. Ishauqe a/w S.K. Lodhi, advocate for petitioner Mr. Javed Rajput, advocate for respondent = Learned counsel for petitioner after arguing the case at some length submits that he would not press this petition on merits if one year’s time is granted to the petitioner to vacate the demised premises viz. shop No.21, New Subhanallah Cloth Market, Asif Colony, Manghopir road, Karachi. Learned counsel for landlord/respondent has extended no objection. Accordingly one year’s time from today is granted to the petitioner to vacate the premises. Either within one year or exactly on expiry of one year from today, the petitioner shall vacate the premises subject to payment of rent and all dues without any further notice. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application in the above terms. JUDGE A.K
